title: ASTARON Reusable 3D Puffy Sticker Book for Kids, 88 Pcs Cute Waterproof Ocean Animals Stickers, Puffy Sticker Game Travel Stickers and Educational Sensory Learning Toy（3-6 Age）
features: 【Learn From Happiness】Puffy Sticker Game Perfect for children practicing fine finger movement, hand-eye coordination, creative expression and other abilities.
【More stickers】 Some marine life stickers have words and some don't, to help children learn and recognize them. You will get 88PCS stickers
【Fold-Out Scenes Book】Sticker books can be expanded to larger, rich and interesting play scenarios for children to imagine and create infinite stories.
【Material】3D Ocean animals stickers is made of high quality TPE & PVC material,Non-toxic,waterproof and can be repeatedly pasted without residue.
【Screen-free Play】Sticker games have lots of pretend-play fun. Get kids to reduce their electronic time to protect their eyes and necks
